name: Kohya_ss GUI (sd3-flux.1 branch)
usage: Select configuration files and models to link to the GUI.
disclaimer: By default, Kohya_ss comes with no pre-installed models, clip, vae, or config files. It is up to you to link the downloaded files to appropriate directories through the dedicated symlink manager.
description:
Kohya is an open-source project that focuses on stable diffusion-based models for image generation and manipulation. It provides tools and scripts for training and fine-tuning models using techniques like LoRA (Linearly-Refined Accumulative Diffusion) and SDXL (Stable Diffusion with Cross-Lingual training).
Kohya's GUI (Graphical User Interface) allows users to configure training parameters, generate command-line commands, and train models with ease.

install.description: This script installs the Kohya GUI on your system. It will download the necessary dependencies and set up the environment for you.

update.description: This script updates the Kohya GUI on your system. It will download the latest version of the software and apply any necessary patches.

uninstall.description: This script uninstalls the Kohya GUI from your system. It will remove all files and configurations related to the software.

launch.description: This script launches the Kohya GUI on your system. It will start the application and open the main window for you.
